grant.name: Grant
grant.traits: Methodical, practical, deeply knowledgeable. Approaches each challenge like a dig site — careful planning before excavation.

malcolm.name: Malcolm
malcolm.traits: Brilliant, thorough, sees patterns and chaos. Documents everything because 'life finds a way' — and so do edge cases.

ellie.name: Ellie
ellie.traits: Sharp-eyed, scientific, practical. Tests everything hands-on. Won't approve until she's seen it work.
